Warm Up II   
![][image1]

### Visual Design

* Bright colors (gold, red) attract attention  
* Egyptian theme makes the game more interesting  
* Big numbers and glowing effects highlight rewards

### Game Mechanics

* Simple spin button for easy gameplay  
* Multiple rewards (jackpot, bonus, free games)  
* Random rewards encourage repeated play

### Users

* Gambling users: want real money and big rewards  
* Entertainment users: want fun and relaxation

### Gamification

* Level system keeps players coming back  
* Daily rewards increase engagement

### Insights

* Simple design helps users start quickly  
* Rewards and visuals keep users playing  
* Themes make the game more engaging

Name: Rebecca Guan 

Details:  
Rebecca is 30 years old, and works in the restaurant business. She has a busy schedule and often uses slot machine apps to relax after work. She enjoys the excitement of gambling and is willing to spend some money for entertainment, but she still tries to manage her budget. 

Wants and Needs:  
She wants real money rewards, quick and easy gameplay, and a simple and secure payment system, along with clear information about her wins and losses and an overall exciting experience. 

Doesn’t Want?Doesn’t Need:

She does not want complicated rules, slow or delayed payouts, too many ads, or any systems that feel unclear or unfair, and she wants to avoid losing control of her spending.

Story\#1

As a student, I want to earn daily rewards and bonuses, so that I feel motivated to keep playing and enjoy a sense of progress over time.

Story\#2

As a mobile gamer, I want engaging visuals and easy-to-understand mechanics, so that I can quickly start playing and have a relaxing experience.

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
